response.justification: Bogdan has strong foundational backend and distributed-systems expertise with 19+ years of experience and multiple senior roles, but critically lacks the required production multi-agent AI systems experience and fintech infrastructure depth. His recent engagement with MCP and AI infrastructure (April 2025–present) is promising but represents only one year of exposure. The role demands demonstrated expertise in agentic frameworks, LLM selection, and regulated financial systems—areas where the candidate shows minimal evidence. His one fintech touchpoint (RIDE Capital, 1.3 years) was brief, and his longer recent tenure (Optilyz, 3+ years) was in direct-mail automation, not financial infrastructure.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed-systems expertise from Dunnhumby (microservices handling millions of requests/second, low-latency optimization)
Event-driven architecture experience via GISCollective platform and demonstrated comfort with high-performance systems
Recent engagement with AI infrastructure and MCP tooling shows willingness to learn emerging agentic technologies
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems—only ~1 year of recent MCP work with unclear production scope
Weak fintech background: only 1.3 years at RIDE Capital; last 3+ years (Optilyz) focused on direct-mail, not financial infrastructure or credit/trading systems
No evidence of leading and scaling engineering teams to the required 10–30+ person range, and no experience governing hybrid delivery models with external partners

key_factors.factor: Fintech infrastructure depth (credit, payment, margin systems)
Backend distributed systems and event-driven architecture
